');lines.forEach((l,i)=>{if(l.match(/import.*from\s+['"]\.\.?//)){const m=l.match(/from\s+['"](.+?)['"]/);if(m){const imp=m[1];const resolved=path.resolve(path.dirname(fp),imp);const exists=[resolved,resolved+'.js',resolved+'.jsx',resolved+'.ts',resolved+'.tsx',resolved+'/index.js',resolved+'/index.jsx'].some(p=>fs.existsSync(p));if(!exists)errors.push(fp+':'+(i+1)+' broken import: '+imp)}}})})};check('app',['.jsx','.tsx','.js']);check('components',['.jsx','.tsx','.js']);check('lib',['.js']);['extension/manifest.json'].forEach(f=>{if(fs.existsSync(f)){const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));if(m.content_scripts)m.content_scripts.forEach(cs=>cs.js.forEach(j=>{if(!fs.existsSync(path.join('extension',j)))errors.push('manifest references missing: extension/'+j)}))}});['app/globals.css','app/layout.jsx','app/page.jsx','components/Nav.jsx','components/Footer.jsx'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f))errors.push('Missing critical file: '+f)});const css=fs.existsSync('app/globals.css')?fs.readFileSync('app/globals.css','utf8'):'';if(css.includes('--bg: #ffffff')||css.includes('--bg: #fff'))errors.push('globals.css has WHITE background variables — should be dark theme (#060F1C)');const layout=fs.existsSync('app/layout.jsx')?fs.readFileSync('app/layout.jsx','utf8'):'';if(layout.includes('bg-white'))errors.push('layout.jsx has bg-white — should be bg-navy-950 for dark theme');if(errors.length>0){console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'DEEP SCAN FOUND '+errors.length+' ERROR(S):
'+errors.join('
')+'

FIX ALL OF THESE BEFORE ENDING SESSION.'}))}else{console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'Deep scan clean — 0 errors. All imports valid. Theme consistent.'}))}"
